name: allow_production
role: Enforces a strict production whitelist. Teams can ONLY build the listed units.

name: auto_construct
role: Instantly completes construction (0 build time) for specific units.

name: control_despawn
role: Removes specific units when triggers (Time or Unit Count) are met. Useful for 'Phase Transitions' or 'Objective-based mechanics' (e.g., killing a boss stops minion spawns).

name: control_spawn
role: Spawns units when triggers (Time or Unit Count) are met. Essential for 'Wave Defense', 'Reinforcements', or 'Boss Fights'.

name: prioritize_target
role: Forces a team's units to ignore standard targeting and prioritize attacking specific high-value targets within range (500). Essential for 'Assassination' or 'Boss Focus' scenarios.

name: restrict_attack
role: Prevents a team from attacking specific unit types. Essential for 'Escort Missions' (e.g., don't kill the Ally VIP) or 'Capture Objectives' (don't destroy the building you need to capture).
